tools.name: check_eligibility
tools.description: Check if a flight qualifies for EU261 delay compensation and compute the € amount

tools.name: compute_ev
tools.description: Compute EU261 expected value for a trip: net cost after compensation probability

tools.name: record_price
tools.description: Store a fare observation for trend tracking (builds price history in DO state)

tools.name: get_price_history
tools.description: Retrieve stored price history for a route

tools.name: list_airports
tools.description: List all known airports with EU status

tools.name: distance
tools.description: Calculate great-circle distance between two airports and the EU261 compensation band
